title: Lag Slayer: FPS Edition
description:
🔥 Lag Slayer: FPS Edition 
Lag Slayer: FPS Edition is a lightweight Fabric modpack built specifically for low-end PCs struggling with Minecraft 1.21.5.

🚀 Boosts FPS from 20–30 to over 100+ using powerful client-side mods.
body:
🔥 Lag Slayer: FPS Edition
Lag Slayer: FPS Edition is a lightweight Fabric modpack built specifically for low-end PCs struggling with Minecraft 1.21.5.

🚀 Boosts FPS from 20–30 to over 140+ using powerful client-side mods.

⚙️ Features:
Sodium, Lithium for massive FPS gains

Entity Culling and Cull Less Leaves to reduce lag from mobs and leaves

LazyDFU and Fastload to speed up game loading

Modern UI optimizations like BetterF3 and memory improvements

Pre-configured settings for maximum performance out of the box

🎮 Designed for:
SKLauncher and other vanilla-compatible launchers

Singleplayer or multiplayer (all mods are client-side only)

Players with low RAM or older CPUs/GPUs

📁 Contents:
mods/: handpicked performance mods

resourcepacks/: optional low-res visuals

config/: custom performance settings
